## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, AI initiatives, and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing early promising results with 10 articles posted, 15 in queue, scaling to 20-25/week](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Superhuman launching major AI features on Monday, ahead of competitor's launch](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Discussion on AI terminology (AI-native, agentic AI) and potential content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Superhuman's Q2 roadmap heavily focused on AI features and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Progress

  - [10 articles posted this week, 15 more in queue](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Scaling up to 20-25 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Early signs of traction: impressions and clicks appearing in Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Notably fast indexing, likely due to Superhuman's strong domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Superhuman Product Updates

  - [AI features launching on Monday, ahead of Notion's mail launch on Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Q2 roadmap focused on AI, including:](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [AI GA launch](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Continuous AI feature releases](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - ["Summer of AI" marquee campaign](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [AI calendar integration](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### AI Terminology and Positioning

  - [Discussion on terms: AI-native, AI-powered, agentic AI](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Superhuman transitioning from "AI-powered" to "AI-native"](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Potential future focus on educating market about AI agents and agentic AI](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content defining various AI categories and differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

### Superhuman Website Updates

  - [Two new pages launched this week](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Home page iteration coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Full website re-architecture planned in the next 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Superhuman Email Management Features

  - [Auto-reminder and auto-draft capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [AI learning user communication styles for personalized drafts](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Calendar integration for easy scheduling within emails](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to continue scaling up content production](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [GrowthX to select and prioritize topics without requiring approval for each article](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Superhuman to launch AI features on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Explore content opportunities around AI definitions and categories](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Continue website updates and prepare for full re-architecture](https://fathom.video/share/KrMX3Et4JvSvuiFDVF4HFpot4iWkq4-s?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
